name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Repeated Nslookup Usage
notes: This Building Block triggers when the nslookup is used repeatedly. The threshold can still be considered as a normal administration behavior and needs to be correlated with other events to be considered as abnormal.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Repeated Nslookup Usage on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) matches any of expressions (?i)nslookup(\.exe)?
when at least 5 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 5 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Repeated Nslookup Usage on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) matches any of expressions (?i)nslookup(\.exe)?
AND when at least 5 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 5 minutes
